name: Clinical Trial Participant Journey
input: Create a journey diagram showing a clinical trial participant's experience. Sections: Screening (Learn about trial: 5, Initial phone call: 3, Informed consent visit: 4, Blood work and physical: 3), Randomization (Assignment to arm: 4, Receive study drug or placebo: 3), Treatment Phase (Weekly clinic visits: 3, Side effect monitoring: 2, Dose adjustments: 3, Monthly blood draws: 2), Follow-Up (End of treatment assessment: 4, 30-day safety follow-up: 3, Long-term survival tracking: 5). Show the emotional journey from hopeful to anxious to relieved.
qualityCriteria: All 4 sections present (Screening, Randomization, Treatment Phase, Follow-Up)
At least 10 task entries with satisfaction scores
Satisfaction scores range from 2 to 5 (showing emotional variation)
Clinical trial terminology preserved (informed consent, randomization, placebo)
Valid Mermaid syntax that parses without errors
napkinBenchmark: Journey diagram with 4 sections, 12+ tasks, satisfaction scores showing emotional arc from hopeful to anxious to relieved.
